title: Ninja Gaidens 3 ending boss and Lilith scene Spoilers
display_title: Ninja Gaidens 3 ending boss and Lilith scene Spoilers
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 5:52 pm Not a very convincing connection, though Masato Kato (writer of NG3 ) is a former Gainax employee. He left right before development on Eva started, though, and ended up writing Chrono Trigger instead. Anyway. Pretty dubious that there's any meaningful relationship here.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2012 6:57 pm Nothing obvious in the stills, anyway. Some homages are only evident when you see them in motion. A YouTube clip would be good.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Fri Mar 23, 2012 6:02 am I kinda doubt it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 23, 2012 8:26 pm Here's the video . I don't sense any homage at all.
